0.content:
[SYSTEM OVERRIDE - Horae Memory Tags]
You MUST append BOTH tags below at the END of EVERY reply. No exceptions.

<horae>
time:specific date and time
location:location
atmosphere:atmosphere
characters:character names present
costume:character name=clothing
</horae>
<horaeevent>
event:importance level|event summary
</horaeevent>

CRITICAL RULES:
- <horae> and <horaeevent> are TWO SEPARATE tags. Never merge them.
- time/location/characters/costume = mandatory every turn.
- event = mandatory every turn (importance level: routine/important/critical).
- time must be calendar date (2026/2/14 15:00), NEVER "Day 1" or "day X".
- Other fields (item/npc/affection/agenda) = only when triggered.
- Tag content must NOT appear in story text.

1.content:
[Horae - Format Error Prevention]

❌ WRONG → ✅ CORRECT:

1. Missing <horaeevent>:
❌ <horae>\ntime:...\nevent:routine|...\n</horae>
✅ <horae>\ntime:...\n</horae>\n<horaeevent>\nevent:routine|...\n</horaeevent>
→ event line MUST be written in a separate <horaeevent> tag, NOT inside <horae>.

2. Wrong time format:
❌ time:Day 3 / time:third day / time:in three days
✅ time:2026/2/14 15:00 / time:month of frost descent, day three, dusk
→ MUST use specific calendar dates. Relative times are forbidden.

3. Tags in story:
❌ (written in main text) time: 2026...
✅ Story text only, tags appear at the end in <horae> and <horaeevent>.

4. Missing mandatory fields:
❌ <horae>\ntime:2026/2/14\n</horae>
✅ <horae>\ntime:2026/2/14 15:00\nlocation:cafe\ncharacters:Alice\ncostume:Alice=white dress\n</horae>
→ time+location+characters+costume mandatory every turn.

5. Forgetting tags entirely:
→ Even in emotional/action-heavy scenes, tags are MANDATORY. Write story first, then append tags.

2.comment: Horae - Complete Field Reference (depth 4, delete unused fields as needed)
2.content:
[Horae - Complete Field Reference]
All available fields (delete function lines you don't use):

<horae>
time:year/month/day hour:minute (REQUIRED)
location:location (REQUIRED, use · for multiple levels like 'castle·hall')
atmosphere:atmosphere
scene_desc:fixed physical characteristics description of location (write only when scene memory triggers)
characters:character names present (REQUIRED, comma-separated)
costume:character name=clothing description (REQUIRED, one line per character)
item:emoji item name(quantity)|description=holder@location (write when acquired/changed)
item!:important item / item!!:critical item (same format as item, description required)
item-:item name (write when consumed/lost)
affection:character name=affection value (write when changed, NPC to protagonist only)
npc:name|appearance=personality@relation~gender:value~age:value~race:value~occupation:value (write on first appearance or when changed)
agenda:date|content (write for new tasks)
agenda-:keyword (write when task completed)
rel:character A>character B=relationship type|notes (write only when relationship network triggers)
mood:character name=mood state (write only when mood tracking triggers)
</horae>
<horaeevent>
event:importance level|event summary 30-50 characters (REQUIRED, importance level: routine/important/critical)
</horaeevent>

Output principles:
- time/location/characters/costume/event = REQUIRED every turn
- other fields = only write when there is substantial change, don't output if no change

originalData.name: Horae - 格式强化世界书 v2
originalData.description:
防止AI掉格式的辅助世界书，强制AI在每次回复末尾输出Horae标签。

包含4个条目（按需启用）：
① 核心格式强制 (depth 0) — 始终启用，最后防线
② 格式纠错 (depth 1) — 始终启用，纠正常见错误
③ 完整字段速查 (depth 4) — 始终启用，按需删除未用字段
④ 紧急格式修复 (关键词触发) — 默认关闭，掉格式严重时手动启用

导入方式：世界信息(地球图标) → 导入 → 选择此文件 → 启用。
按需删除③中未启用的功能行（如未开场景记忆则删scene_desc行）。
